reasoning: The order is flagged with a FRAUD ALERT indicating the customer has 13 refunds in the last 60 days with confirmed delivery on all prior claims and an extremely high refund rate (87%). The system explicitly states 'DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately.' Per policy, this refund request should not be approved or denied at this level and must be escalated to Loss Prevention for further investigation.
